rulings.Case Title: DAVID YANG et al VS. FOLSOM/ FIRST LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, May 23, 2011, line 1. DEFENDANTS FOLSOM/ FIRST LLC, CRESCENT HEIGHTS INC, HOWARD S WRIGHT CONSTRUCTION COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' demurrer to the 2nd, 5th and 7th causes of action are overruled. The 2nd and 5th causes of action are sufficiently stated and it would be improper for the Court to interpret the settlement agreement on demurrer to determine if the 7th cause of action is barred. Defendants' demurrer to the 3rd and 4th causes of action is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must state the terms of the contract or attach a copy of the contract to the complaint. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID YANG et al VS. FOLSOM/ FIRST LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, May 23, 2011, line 1. DEFENDANT THE METROPOLITAN ASSOCIATION'S Motion To Strike. Defendant's motion to strike the punitive damages claim is granted with leave to amend. Plaintiff's opposition cites to paragraphs 94 and 97 of the second amended complaint, but there are not such paragraphs. Plaintiff must plead facts sufficient to support this prayer. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID YANG et al VS. FOLSOM/ FIRST LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, May 23, 2011, line 1. DEFENDANTS FOLSOM/ FIRST LLC, CRESCENT HEIGHTS INC, HOWARD S WRIGHT CONSTRUCTION COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. The defendants' motion to strike the request for attorney's fees in the prayer for damages is granted with leave to amend. Plaintiff must allege grounds to support this claim. =(302/LMG)
